settings.title: Athan Times Configuration
settings.no_times: No times available yet. Click Save to pull new data.
settings.calc_method_desc: The authority or algorithm used to calculate prayer times. Change if the default does not match your local mosque.
settings.school_desc: Hanafi uses a longer shadow ratio, giving a later Asr time.
settings.lat_adj_desc: Only affects locations where standard times are undefined (e.g. Arctic summers). Leave as Automatic unless advised otherwise.
settings.prayer_offset_desc: Shift each prayer by ±minutes to match your local mosque’s announced times.
settings.suhoor_offset_desc: How many minutes before Fajr should the Suhoor alarm trigger?
settings.hijri_desc: Use 1 or -1 if your local official moon sighting differs from the standard calculated calendar.
settings.saved_alert: Settings Saved! Close and reopen this page in a few seconds to see the updated schedule.
